accurate.why: All claims accurately reflect the bill text and the FWS rule.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; the rule's classifications are described accurately.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the resolution as nullifying the FWS lesser prairie-chicken listing rule under the CRA.

changes_to_existing_law.why: CRA disapproval does not amend existing statutes.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers the single operative disapproval provision and its legal effect.

correct_entities.why: Correctly identifies the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service and the rule's title and Federal Register citation.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
